channel.title: Pro Truck Logistics Blog
channel.description: Industry news, trends, and expert advice from Pro Truck Logistics.

item.title: How Fuel Costs Keep Squeezing Owner-Operators Even With Surcharges in Place
item.description: Fuel is still one of the fastest ways to erase profit in trucking. Even with fuel programs, trucker surcharges, and “pass-through” adjustments in place, many owner-operators and small fleets are finding that rising diese...

item.title: The Safety Tech Gap: Why Drivers Don’t Trust Tools That Look Good on Paper
item.description: The Safety Tech Gap: Why Drivers Don’t Trust Tools That Look Good on Paper Safety tech is supposed to make the road safer, not start a fight in the shop. But in many fleets, the minute a dash cam, alert system, or AI mon...

item.title: ELD Crackdown 2026: What Fleets Are Still Getting Wrong and What Fleets Can Learn
item.description: For a lot of fleets, ELD compliance still gets treated like a back-office chore. Then a roadside inspection, a log audit, or a simple device glitch turns it into a shutdown problem, a missed load, or a preventable fine....

item.title: What fleets can learn from detention pay disputes driving driver turnover
item.description: Drivers rarely leave over one bad week of miles. More often, they leave when the paycheck stops feeling predictable, especially when detention, layover, and dispatch decisions make them wonder what they’ll actually be pa...

item.title: ELD, ELD-Adjacent Data, and Smarter Fleet Compliance in 2026
item.description: ELD, ELD-Adjacent Data, and Smarter Fleet Compliance in 2026 Electronic logging has made it easier to track hours-of-service activity, but ELD compliance in 2026 is no longer just about the log itself. Fleets are being j...

item.title: Preventable Roadside Failures: How Fleet Maintenance Can Reduce Safety Downtime
item.description: Preventable Roadside Failures: How Fleet Maintenance Can Reduce Safety Downtime Roadside breakdowns rarely happen without warning. In many fleets, the signs are there long before a truck is pulled over, sidelined at a sc...

item.title: How Dispatch Technology Is Changing Load Planning for Trucking Fleets
item.description: How Dispatch Technology Is Changing Load Planning for Trucking Fleets **Category:** Logistics Technology **Date:** April 22, 2026 Load planning has always been one of the most important parts of fleet operations. The goa...
